## Type

- [ ] New exercise
- [ ] Prompt improvement (new/modified clause)

## For prompt changes

- [ ] Motivated by a documented failure mode (link to findings doc)
- [ ] Tested on at least one exercise after the change
- [ ] No regression on previously passing exercises

## For new exercises

- [ ] Exercise spec in `exercises/NNN-*.md`
- [ ] Buggy workspace created (if debug exercise)
- [ ] Run with at least one CME agent
- [ ] Findings document in `docs/`

## For new model support

- [ ] Provider + model added to `opencode.json`
- [ ] Both CME and Vanilla agent entries created
- [ ] Baseline run on exercise 001 + 008 documented
